case_title: ULRIKE STEINBACH VS. JEAN MAGUIRE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $346.80 FILED BY STEINBACH, ULRIKE AS TO DEFENDANT MAGUIRE, JEAN MAGUIRE, HANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -0- SERVED JUN-07-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAGUIRE, JEAN
PROOF OF SERVICE DOES NOT GIVE NAME OR PHYSCIAL DESCRIPTION OF THE PERSON ACCEPTING SERVICE FOR THE DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DATE AND PLAICE OF MAILING ON SUBSTITUTE SERVICE. SERVIE FEES -0-

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-02-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT HANK MAGUIRE WAIVES DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2013 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEINBACH, ULRIKE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MAGUIRE, JEAN MAGUIRE, HANK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
